content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_NegativeInventory
as
SELECT      A.*, B.ITNO, B.STQT, TRDT, RESP
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT WHLO, WHSL
FROM        M3.MITPCE
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      WHLO, ITNO, WHSL, STQT
FROM        M3.MITLOC
WHERE       STQT < 0
) B ON      A.WHLO = B.WHLO AND A.WHSL = B.WHSL

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT M.WHLO, M.WHSL, M.ITNO, M.TRDT, M.RESP
FROM        M3.MITTRA M
JOIN        (SELECT WHLO, WHSL, ITNO, MAX(cast(TRDT as varchar(max))+cast(TRTM as varchar(max))) TRDT FROM M3.MITTRA GROUP BY WHLO, WHSL, ITNO) M2 ON M.WHLO = M2.WHLO AND M.WHSL = M2.WHSL AND M.ITNO = M2.ITNO AND cast(M.TRDT as varchar(max))+cast(M.TRTM as varchar(max)) = M2.TRDT
) C ON      A.WHLO = C.WHLO AND A.WHSL = C.WHSL AND B.ITNO = C.ITNO
WHERE       STQT < 0
